name: Spicy Vegetable Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a bowl.
2. Mix well until thoroughly combined.
3. Transfer the mixture to a container and chill until ready to serve.
This dip is best served chilled over celery sticks, green onions, green peppers, cauliflower, or other crisp raw vegetables. Makes 1 1/3 cups.
Serving size: 2 Tbsp (18 calories, free food)
- Protein: 1.2 gm
- Fat: 0.3 gm
- Carbohydrate: 2.8 gm
- Sodium: 260.2 mg
- Potassium: 72.2 mg
- Fiber: 0.2 gm
- Cholesterol: 1 mg
Source: American Diabetes Association, Family Cookbook
